office_does: A U.S. representative writes and votes on federal law and spending, conducts oversight, and provides constituent services.
race_blurb: First-term incumbent Emily Randall faces an anti-party independent, a fiscal and public-safety Republican, a social-investment and demilitarization candidate, and an America First challenger.

candidates.summary: O'Gorman centers an anti-two-party, anti-insider critique and calls for reforms involving civil forfeiture, qualified immunity, and gerrymandering.
highlights: Served 16 years as an Army and National Guard field medic [S1]
Says party and insider arrangements distort representation [S1][S2]
Criticizes civil forfeiture, qualified immunity, and gerrymandering [S1]

experience.basis: He offers military and volunteer experience but no elected record.

reform.basis: His campaign centrally attacks two-party, insider, gerrymandering, and qualified-immunity structures.

candidates.summary: The first-term incumbent emphasizes Medicaid protection, cost reduction, oversight, and bipartisan investment in district infrastructure and services.
highlights: Prioritizes reducing costs and protecting Medicaid [S1][S2]
Reports securing nearly $18 million for district projects [S1]
Emphasizes bipartisan housing, ferry, infrastructure, tribal, and military-family projects [S1]

spending.basis: Her record and platform emphasize federal investment in district infrastructure, housing, emergency management, and services.

experience.basis: She has a current congressional voting and oversight record, though she is a first-term incumbent.

reform.basis: She emphasizes institutional coalition-building, bipartisan caucus work, and established organizational support.

immigration.basis: She opposes Trump administration immigration actions, without advocating the structural abolition proposed by Jones.

healthcare.basis: She prioritizes protecting Medicaid and reducing costs within the existing system.

candidates.summary: Lawson offers an America First populist platform with juvenile workforce rehabilitation, tribal empowerment, and targeted health-care and technology proposals.
highlights: Supports secure elections, tribal empowerment, and juvenile rehabilitation tied to workforce development [S1][S2]
Proposes changes aimed at pharmaceutical intermediaries [S1]
Previously ran for governor and U.S. Senate but has not held elected office [S1]

safety.basis: His documented public-safety proposal emphasizes juvenile rehabilitation through workforce development.

experience.basis: He is a repeat outsider candidate without an elected record.

reform.basis: His America First candidacy is explicitly populist and anti-establishment.

healthcare.basis: He proposes targeted reform of pharmaceutical intermediaries rather than universal public coverage.

candidates.summary: Jones advances the field's broadest social-investment platform and its clearest positions for abolishing ICE, reducing overseas-war spending, and regulating AI.
highlights: Supports universal health care, labor rights, schools, infrastructure, elder care, and food security [S1][S2]
Supports abolishing ICE and detention centers and limiting surveillance [S1]
Opposes overseas-war spending and rejects AIPAC funding [S1]

spending.basis: She proposes broad public investment across health care, labor, schools, infrastructure, elder care, and food security.

climate.basis: She supports environmental protection and tribal partnerships to protect forests and rivers.

experience.basis: She brings health-care, elder-care, and community experience but no elected record.

immigration.basis: She explicitly supports abolishing ICE and detention centers.

healthcare.basis: She explicitly supports universal health care.

tech.basis: She favors surveillance limits and responsible AI regulation.

defense.basis: She opposes overseas-war spending and rejects AIPAC funding.

candidates.summary: Fox presents a conventional Republican platform focused on lower taxes, balanced budgets, law enforcement, anti-trafficking efforts, and maritime and naval employment.
highlights: Supports lower taxes and balanced budgets [S1][S2]
Supports law enforcement, first responders, and stronger action against drugs and trafficking [S1][S2]
Reports 30 years in compliance, safety, risk management, and project budgets [S1]

safety.basis: She emphasizes law enforcement, first responders, and enforcement against drugs and trafficking.

experience.basis: She has extensive professional and party-service experience but no elected record.
